response: - the gene of the spirit is passed down through the language of the soul, and the visit of the holy guru brings clarity to the mind, where the language of the heart becomes the spirit of the seeker. the spirit of the language is revealed in the visit of the guru, and the gene of the spirit is found in the language of the heart. *** the language of the soul is the gene of the spirit, and the visit of the guru brings the spirit to the heart. the spirit of the language is found in the visit of the guru, and the gene of the spirit is revealed in the language of the heart.
